Metadata.title: Calyx Systems | MedCanG B2B Procurement Demo
Metadata.description: Architectural demonstration of a MedCanG-compliant B2B medical cannabis procurement and telemedical triage platform.
Metadata.ogTitle: Calyx Systems | MedCanG B2B Procurement Demo
Metadata.ogDescription: Simulated GDP-compliant wholesale platform for German pharmacies. Powered by Next.js and strict Zod validation.
Metadata.twitterTitle: Calyx Systems | MedCanG B2B Procurement Demo
Metadata.twitterDescription: Architectural demonstration of a MedCanG-compliant B2B medical cannabis procurement and telemedical triage platform.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: Data handling for this architectural demonstration.

dataCollection.title: Data & Mock Data
dataCollection.intro: As this is a RegTech portfolio demonstration, no real personal data is collected or processed:
items: Only hardcoded mock data is used for display purposes.
Local browser storage is used strictly to simulate JWT sessions and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC).
No real patient, pharmacy, or prescription data is ingested or stored.

dataSecurity.title: Infrastructure & Security
dataSecurity.description: This demonstration is hosted on a high-performance, Cloudflare-only infrastructure utilizing Cloudflare DNS, Pages, and Edge Workers to ensure zero-latency routing and edge-level security.

rights.title: Tracking & Cookies
items: No third-party tracking scripts, pixels, or analytics are deployed.
Session persistence and UI state are handled entirely client-side.

terms.title: Terms of Service & Disclaimer
terms.subtitle: Legal notice regarding this architectural demonstration.

section1.title: 1. Nature of the Platform
section1.para1: This website is a technical and architectural demonstration portfolio created and owned by Trade Temple AB.
section1.para2: By accessing this site, you acknowledge that this is a simulated RegTech environment and not a functioning commercial or medical entity.
section1.para3: There is no actual narcotic supply chain, wholesale distribution, or medical triage occurring on this platform.
section1.para4: No real products, medical cannabis batches, or healthcare services are sold, brokered, or provided.

section2.title: 2. Permitted Use
section2.para1: This platform is intended solely for evaluation by prospective employers, CTOs, and technical recruiters.
section2.para2: You agree not to abuse, reverse-engineer, or attempt to exploit the mock backend systems or edge functions.
list: No automated scraping or penetration testing.
The platform is for visual and architectural evaluation only.

section3.title: 3. Mock Data & Compliance Simulation
section3.para1: All batch numbers, THC/CBD values, pricing, and medical data displayed are entirely fictitious.
section3.para2: Certificates of Analysis (CoAs) and regulatory logic (such as MedCanG quota enforcement and FHIR parsing) are simulated for demonstration purposes.

section4.title: 4. Simulated Transactions
section4.para1: The B2B procurement checkout, FHIR parser, and audit logs are interactive simulations.
section4.para2: No financial transactions, SEPA mandates, or actual logistics dispatches will be executed.

section5.title: 5. Intellectual Property
section5.para1: The underlying codebase, UI/UX architecture, and compliance algorithms are the intellectual property of Trade Temple AB.
section5.para2: The code, designs, and architecture may not be replicated, copied, or used for commercial applications without explicit written permission.

section6.title: 6. Liability & Warranties
section6.para1: The platform is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind.
section6.para2: Trade Temple AB assumes no liability for any reliance placed on the simulated compliance logic, data, or interface presented.

section7.title: 7. Governing Law
section7.para1: These terms and the protection of the intellectual property herein are governed by the laws of Sweden.
